title: Meet the Team: USMNT 2026 World Cup Roster
original_text:
U.S. Men’s National Team head coach Mauricio Pochettino has named the 26-player roster for the upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026™.

With just a few weeks until the team takes the pitch in its opener against Paraguay in Los Angeles, get to know all 26 players below.

Goalkeeper Height: 6-3 (1.91 m) Weight: 174 lbs. (78 kg) Born: June 24, 1994 in Park Ridge, N.J. Hometown: Park Ridge, N.J. Club: New England Revolution (United States) Instagram: @headdturnerr Twitter: @headdturnerr

Defender Height: 5-8 (1.73 m) Weight: 150 lbs. (68 kg) Born: November 3, 2000 in Almere, Netherlands Hometown: Almere, Netherlands Club: PSV Eindhoven (Netherlands) Instagram: @sgd_2 Twitter: @sergino_dest 37 Caps / 2 Goals / 6 Assists

Defender Height: 6-2 (1.88 m) Weight: 183 lbs. (83 kg) Born: March 28, 2000 in Birmingham, Ala. Hometown: Birmingham, Ala. Club: Crystal Palace (England) Instagram: @eastmamba Twitter: @Chris__Richards 36 Caps / 3 Goals / 0 Assists
